verdicts.notes: Independently recomputed the exact Batch 011 manifest and engine bindings and re-executed all 252 frozen fixtures through the real engine. Fresh composite-document probes covered agenda dividers and ordered/preparation lists; reference-link labels, destinations, direct/reference syntax, section scope, and inert scheme semantics; recommendation options, direct blockquotes, and ordered next steps; plus Setext, HTML/fenced/escaped lookalikes, H2 occurrence/order, duplicate-title Review, hidden-only lists, retry-family anatomy, collisions, and prose/case isolation. No stop/restart condition was triggered.
